column.name: CCCATEGORY
column.description: Client control: Role of client (production, test,...)

column.name: CCCORACTIV
column.description: Changes and transports for client-specific objects

column.name: CCNOCLIIND
column.description: Maintenance authorization for objects in all clients

column.name: CCCOPYLOCK
column.description: Protection reg. client copy program and comparison tools

column.name: CCNOCASCAD
column.description: Client control: No client cascade for upgrade import

column.name: CCSOFTLOCK
column.description: Client control: Soft Lock Required (Planned for 4.0)

column.name: CCORIGCONT
column.description: Recording Client for Switch BC Sets

column.name: CCIMAILDIS
column.description: Client Control: CATT and eCATT Authorization

column.name: CCTEMPLOCK
column.description: Client control: Indicator that client is temporarily locked
